nasb.text: And since he would not be persuaded, we fell silent, remarking, “The will of the Lord be done!”

esv.text: And since he would not be persuaded, we ceased and said, “Let the will of the Lord be done.”

cnv.text: 他既然不聽勸，我們只說了“願主的旨意成就”，就不出聲了。

ccb.text: 我们知道再劝也无济于事，只好对他说：“愿主的旨意成就。”

csbs.text: 我们既然不能说服保罗，就都安静下来，只说：“愿主的旨意成就。”
